Solid buttons — white/dark text on solid intent

Soft / ghost / outline buttons — intent text on transparent/tint (uses -text)

Solid badges — same solid pair

Primary Success Warning Danger Info

Soft badges — intent text on 15% intent tint

Primary Success Warning Danger Info

Alerts — dark body text + intent link on 7% intent tint

Primary title
Body text here. A link.
Success title
Body text here. A link.
Warning title
Body text here. A link.
Danger title
Body text here. A link.
Info title
Body text here. A link.
